title: Lisandro Martínez Leaves Final Injured Before Halftime
description: Lisandro Martínez is trending following reports that he left the Spain vs. Argentina final injured before halftime, with sources describing a muscle injury and an emotional exit.

sources.title: España vs Argentina, en vivo: Lisandro Martínez sale lesionado antes del descanso
Salida y llanto de Lisandro Martínez tras sufrir una lesión muscular
🚨 Mazazo en la final: estrella del Mundial, fuera antes del descanso

sections.heading: Match Incident
paragraphs: According to Claro Sports, Lisandro Martínez left the Spain vs. Argentina match injured before the halftime break. OneFootball also reported that a World Cup star was out before the end of the first half during the final.

sections.heading: Injury Details
paragraphs: La Nación reported that Martínez suffered a muscle injury. The same source noted that his exit involved tears following the incident.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: Google Trends data indicates a search volume lower bound of 1,000 for the term "lisandro martínez" in the ZA region as of July 19, 2026.

faq.q: What happened to Lisandro Martínez during the match?
faq.a: According to Claro Sports, he left the Spain vs. Argentina match injured before halftime. La Nación reported he suffered a muscle injury.

faq.q: How did Lisandro Martínez react to the injury?
faq.a: La Nación reported that Martínez was crying after suffering the muscle injury.
Claro Sports and OneFootball identified the match as a final between Spain and Argentina.
